category_sources: source_facts.description says it audits git repos for secrets; official site describes Gitleaks as an open-source secret scanner for git repositories, files, and directories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitleaks; official site and GitHub repository title use Gitleaks.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary usage documentation; official site links to the GitHub project and describes the scanner.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site identify secret scanning for git repositories and files.
